arts.sum: Nottingham Forest host Manchester United in the Premier League tonight seeking to take another step closer to the Champions League. Nuno Espirito Santo’s side are closing in on a place in Europe’s elite, sitting third in the table with nine games to go. arts.ttl: Man Utd face biggest test as Saka makes timely Arsenal return
arts.sum: How Leicester supporters would love a season of disappointment like the one Manchester City are 'enduring' - a FA Cup semi-final at Wembley to look forward to with Pep Guardiola's side still well placed to secure Champions League football next term. Alexander-Arnold suffered a high ankle sprain in the club's Champions League loss to Paris Saint-Germain before the international break that will see him miss the visit of Everton, and with his back-up Conor Bradley also likely to be absent with a hamstring issue, Slot must decide who starts on the right-hand side of the defence as the Reds look to take another step closer to the title.
